SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement ("Agreement") is made on the 15th day of October 2023, by and between:

SELLER: Dr. Emily Tan, NRIC No. S7654321B, residing at 23 Orchard Lane, Singapore 239876, Email: emilytan@fakesgcompany.sg, Phone: +65 6123 4567.

AND

BUYER: Apex Holdings Pte Ltd, UEN: 202312345K, with its registered office at 78 Raffles Avenue, Singapore 039797, Email: contact@apexholdings.sg, Phone: +65 6789 0123.

WHEREAS, the Seller agrees to sell and the Buyer agrees to purchase 1,000 shares of common stock in Quantum Dynamics Ltd for a total purchase price of SGD 500,000.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
